title: Parkio Daily: May 1, 2026
teaser: Tropical Americas construction progresses at Animal Kingdom with authentic materials from ancient Maya quarries. Plus, dining updates and more.

rides.name: Avatar Flight of Passage
rides.note: Lower crowds today before weekend rush

bignews.title: Tropical Americas brings authentic Maya stone from Honduras
bignews.body: Imagineers traveled to ancient Maya quarries in Honduras to source red and green stones for Animal Kingdom's Tropical Americas land. Master Maya carvers will use traditional techniques to craft elements from the same materials that built the historic Copán site. The new land opens in 2027.

bignews.title: First Encanto attraction coming to Animal Kingdom
bignews.body: The first-ever Encanto attraction at any Disney park will debut in Tropical Americas. Guests will celebrate Antonio's gift of talking to animals and learn that everyone is part of the familia of all living things. Imagineers researched in Colombia to authentically represent the film's inspiration.

topstories.title: Pueblo Esperanza: Animal Kingdom's newest town takes shape
topstories.body: The new Tropical Americas land will center on Pueblo Esperanza, a culturally rich town surrounded by rainforest. Like Africa's Harambe and Asia's Anandapur, this will be a fully realized community with its own history and architecture inspired by Central and South America.

spotlight.title: Tropical Americas: A dream decades in the making
spotlight.body: Early concepts for Animal Kingdom expansion imagined guests exploring Maya temples and lush rainforests. Now those visions are becoming reality with Tropical Americas, blending Encanto, Indiana Jones, and authentic regional culture. The land represents nearly 30 years of Imagineering evolution since the park first opened.
